UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user profile within the Campus Hub application.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user, matching the Firebase Auth UID.

email.description: The email address of the user.

dni.description: The user's national identity document number.

role.description: Role of the user in the system.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

profilePicture.description: URL of the user's profile picture.

cvUrl.description: URL to the user's CV/Resume file.

bio.description: A short professional biography, mainly for professors.

specialization.description: An array of specializations or areas of expertise for professors.

officeHours.description: A string describing office hours for professors (e.g., 'Mon/Wed 10-12').

programId.description: The ID of the university program the student is enrolled in.

UniversityProgram.title: UniversityProgram
UniversityProgram.description: Represents a university academic program or career.

name.description: The full name of the program (e.g., 'Ingeniería de Software').

facultyId.description: The ID of the faculty this program belongs to.

totalCredits.description: Total number of credits required to complete the program.

totalCycles.description: Total number of cycles (semesters/terms) in the program.

Faculty.title: Faculty
Faculty.description: Represents a faculty or school within the university.

name.description: The full name of the faculty (e.g., 'Facultad de Ingeniería').

IntranetPost.title: IntranetPost
IntranetPost.description: Represents a post on the intranet portal, like news or announcements.

postId.description: Unique identifier for the intranet post.

authorId.description: The UID of the user who created the post.

title.description: The title of the intranet post.

content.description: The main content of the intranet post.

createdAt.description: The date and time the post was created.

summary.description: AI-generated summary of the intranet post.

VirtualClassroomCourse.title: VirtualClassroomCourse
VirtualClassroomCourse.description: Represents a course within the virtual classroom.

programId.description: The ID of the program this course belongs to.

instructorId.description: The UID of the instructor for the course.

objectives.description: List of learning objectives for the course.

methodology.description: Teaching methodology used in the course.

syllabusUrl.description: URL to the course syllabus document.

level.description: The academic level of the course (e.g., 'Beginner', 'Advanced').

prerequisites.description: List of course IDs that are prerequisites for this course.

mode.description: The delivery mode of the course.

virtualRoomUrl.description: Link to the virtual classroom if mode is Online or Hybrid.

cycle.description: The academic cycle or semester number this course belongs to.

capacity.description: The total number of students that can enroll in the course.

enrolled.description: The current number of students enrolled in the course.

status.description: The current status of the course.

semesterStartDate.description: The start date of the semester for this course.

semesterEndDate.description: The end date of the semester for this course.

schedule.description: The weekly schedule for the course.

CourseModule.title: CourseModule
CourseModule.description: Represents a week or module within a course.

courseId.description: The ID of the course this module belongs to.

title.description: The title of the module (e.g., 'Semana 1: Introducción').

weekNumber.description: The sequential number of the week or module.

description.description: A brief description of the module's content.

CourseModuleSession.title: CourseModuleSession
CourseModuleSession.description: Represents a single scheduled class session within a course module (week).

date.description: The specific date of the class session.

CourseAssignment.title: CourseAssignment
CourseAssignment.description: Represents an assignment within a course.

courseId.description: The ID of the course this assignment belongs to.

moduleId.description: The ID of the module this assignment belongs to.

dueDate.description: The date and time the assignment is due.

AssignmentSubmission.title: AssignmentSubmission
AssignmentSubmission.description: Represents a student's submission for an assignment.

assignmentId.description: The ID of the assignment this submission is for.

studentId.description: The UID of the student who made the submission.

courseId.description: The ID of the course this submission belongs to.

submittedAt.description: Date and time the assignment was submitted.

grade.description: The grade received for the submission.

TramiteRequest.title: TramiteRequest
TramiteRequest.description: Represents a single administrative request made by a user.

applicantId.description: UID of the user who initiated the request.

requestType.description: The type of request (e.g., 'Certificado de Notas').

generatedDocumentUrl.description: URL to a document generated as part of the request.

TramiteUpdate.title: TramiteUpdate
TramiteUpdate.description: Represents an update or comment in the history of a request.

authorId.description: UID of the admin who made the update.

comment.description: Internal comment or note about the update.

statusChange.description: Describes a status change, e.g., 'De "En Proceso" a "Aprobado"'.

FinancialInfo.title: FinancialInfo
FinancialInfo.description: Stores a student's overall financial information.

concept.description: Description of the payment (e.g., 'Tuition Fee - September').

Scholarship.title: Scholarship
Scholarship.description: Represents a scholarship applied to a student's account.

JobOffer.title: JobOffer
JobOffer.description: Represents a job or internship offer.

JobApplication.title: JobApplication
JobApplication.description: Represents a student's application to a job offer.

ExtracurricularEvent.title: ExtracurricularEvent
ExtracurricularEvent.description: Represents an extracurricular event or activity.

organizerId.description: UID of the professor or admin who created the event.

userId.description: UID of the user requesting the service.

AttendanceRecord.title: AttendanceRecord
AttendanceRecord.description: Represents a single attendance record for a student in a course.

attendanceId.description: Unique identifier for the attendance record.

notes.description: Optional notes, e.g., for a justification.

Enrollment.title: Enrollment
Enrollment.description: Represents a student's enrollment in a specific course section for a semester.

enrollmentId.description: Unique identifier for the enrollment record.

courseCode.description: The code of the course (e.g., CS101).

courseImage.description: URL of the course's promotional image.

professorId.description: The UID of the professor teaching the course.

professorName.description: The full name of the professor.

professorProfilePicture.description: URL of the professor's profile picture.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores public user profile information, accessible by other authenticated users. The document ID must match the user's UID.

/users/{userId}/financialInfo/{infoId}.description: Stores the financial summary for a student. Only accessible by the student and admins.

/users/{userId}/scholarships/{scholarshi.description: Stores scholarships awarded to a student. Accessible by the student and admins.

/users/{userId}/job_applications/{applic.description: Stores job applications for a student. Only the student and admins can access.

/programs/{programId}.description: Stores the academic programs (careers) offered by the university.

/faculties/{facultyId}.description: Stores the faculties (schools) of the university.

/intranet_posts/{postId}.description: Stores intranet posts. Publicly readable by any authenticated user, but writable only by the author.

/courses/{courseId}.description: Stores course information. Readable by any authenticated user, but writable only by the instructor.

/courses/{courseId}/modules/{moduleId}.description: Stores the thematic weeks or modules for a specific course. Writable by instructors.

/courses/{courseId}/modules/{moduleId}/s.description: Stores the individual, dated class sessions for a specific week/module.

/enrollments/{enrollmentId}.description: Stores student enrollment records. Students can only read their own enrollments. Admins can read all.

/courses/{courseId}/assignments/{assignm.description: Stores assignments for a course. Readable by authenticated users, writable only by the course instructor.

/submissions/{submissionId}.description: Stores student submissions for an assignment. Students can only read/write their own. Instructors can read/update submissions for their courses.

/tramites/{tramiteId}.description: Stores individual administrative requests. Readable by the applicant and admins. Writable only by admins.

/tramites/{tramiteId}/updates/{updateId}.description: Stores the history of updates and comments for a specific administrative request. Readable by applicant and admins, writable by admins.

/payments/{paymentId}.description: Stores all payment transactions. Admins can read all. Students can only read their own.

/job_offers/{offerId}.description: Stores job and internship offers. Readable by all authenticated users, writable only by admins.

/events/{eventId}.description: Stores extracurricular activities and events. Readable by all, writable by admins and professors.

/wellness_services/{serviceId}.description: Stores appointments for wellness services. Readable by the user and admins.

/attendance/{attendanceId}.description: Stores individual attendance records. Writable by professors and admins. Students can read their own records (indirectly via course pages).
